summary: Iteration 18: Tested Dashboard summary page, Settings page (Header/Footer, Backup/Restore), and Individual Ledger PDF export. All features working correctly. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

stats_displayed: Staff & Attendance (Total Staff, Present Today, Absent Today, Half Day)
Cash Book & Ledger (Cash Balance, Total Ledgers, Lena Hai/Debtors, Dena Hai/Creditors)
Chit Fund & Byaj (Active Chit Funds, Chit Investment, Chit Dividend, Byaj Receivable)
Profit & Loss (Monthly Expenses, This Month Credit, This Month Debit, Net Profit/Loss)
dashboard_page.quick_actions: WORKING - Mark Attendance, Calculate Salary, Cash Book Entry, Party Ledger, Add Expense, Chit Fund
dashboard_page.recent_transactions: WORKING - Shows last 5 transactions with View All link

header_footer_settings.preview_section: WORKING - Shows live preview of header/footer

backup_restore.upload_restore: WORKING - File input with warning message
backup_restore.last_backup_info: WORKING - Shows 'Never' or last backup date

settings_page.save_settings: WORKING - Shows success toast 'Settings saved! Header/Footer updated.'

footer_dynamic_update.company_name_display: WORKING - Shows custom company name from settings
footer_dynamic_update.footer_text_display: WORKING - Shows custom footer text from settings
footer_dynamic_update.localStorage_sync: WORKING - Settings stored in localStorage for immediate use

party_ledger_pdf_export.ledger_modal: WORKING - Opens with Opening Balance, Current Balance, Total Entries
party_ledger_pdf_export.pdf_button: WORKING - data-testid='export-ledger-pdf' present in modal header
party_ledger_pdf_export.pdf_content: WORKING - Uses jspdf-autotable with doc.autoTable (v5 syntax)

navigation_to_settings.admin_dropdown: WORKING - Settings link in Admin dropdown menu

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard shows 16 stat boxes across 4 sections. Settings page has Header/Footer settings with live preview and Backup/Restore section. Party Ledger modal has PDF export button (data-testid='export-ledger-pdf'). Footer dynamically updates from /api/settings and localStorage. Backup downloads as JSON file with format StaffManager_Backup_YYYY-MM-DD_HH-mm.json.
